name: Japandi
summary: A calm minimal style combining restrained hierarchy, warm neutrals, natural materials, and intentional spacing.

palette: warm neutrals, charcoal, muted earth, sage, and wood tones
typography: quiet sans-serif or restrained serif pairing
surfaces: matte panels, soft off-white fields, natural material cues
shapes: simple rectangles, soft radius, and balanced negative space
layout: spacious composition with clear intentional grouping
imagery: natural textures, calm interiors, and uncluttered product scenes

notes: Use restraint as the primary signal.
Use warm surfaces and generous spacing.

recommendations: Use warm background, soft surface, muted accent, and charcoal text roles.
avoid: Avoid cold stark whites as the dominant tone.

recommendations: Use simple rounded or natural line icons.
Use calm solid or outlined buttons with clear contrast.
Use soft surfaces, medium radius, and minimal shadow.
Use simple navigation with ample breathing room.
Use quiet structure and muted background.
Use comfortable fields and clear labels.
Use warm panels and sparse content.
Use subtle tone shift or border clarity.
Use soft fades and simple reveals.
Use low depth and tactile surfaces.
Use calm inline feedback and clear text.
avoid: Avoid alarming color unless error severity requires it.

accessibilityRisks.risk: Muted palettes can drift into low contrast.
accessibilityRisks.mitigation: Use charcoal text and test muted accents against background roles.

css: Use warm surface tokens, readable text contrast, and generous spacing.
do: Let fewer elements carry more meaning.
avoid: Do not make restraint look unfinished.
